channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Reeducation hurry chakravarti
item.description: (Pandit Vanamali Chakravarti Vedantatirtha,who published an edition of Gobhila with the commentary of bhaTTanArAyaNa) Let the pandit realize that erelong he would cease to exercise any influence upon society, if he do not educate himself properly at this juncture. Now or never is the time to cast off all that is useless in the Tol education and to incorporate with it all that is of real value in the learning of the West… The position of the teacher of Sanskrit in a school or college is precisely emblematic of the Tol Pandit’s position in general society.
